overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a leather jacket walking along a riverbank toward a massive waterfall in a rocky canyon. The environment features lush green vegetation, steep cliff faces, and dynamic water effects with high-fidelity lighting typical of modern game engines.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the riverbank through dense foliage, moving toward the waterfall

entered.detail: large twin waterfall cascading down rocky cliff face
tall rocky canyon wall with layered sedimentary rock
steep cliff face framing the right side of the canyon
thick green shrubbery lining the path
calm dark water reflecting the sky and cliffs
mature deciduous tree with spreading branches overhanging the path

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a narrow dirt trail beside a river, surrounded by dense green vegetation. A massive waterfall is visible in the distance between the canyon walls, and the path winds through thick bushes and past a large tree on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon approach with scattered boulders

events.description: emerging from dense vegetation into more open canyon area with clearer view of waterfall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverside path, passing large rocks and approaching the waterfall base

entered.detail: boulder-sized rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the character moves past the dense foliage and large tree, entering a wider section of the canyon. Large rocks appear along the left side of the path, and the waterfall grows larger in the frame as the distance closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with mist and spray

events.description: mist and spray from waterfall becoming visible as character approaches base

agents.ego_description: walking very close to the waterfall base, moving through the misty area at the canyon's end

entered.detail: water mist rising from the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the massive waterfall, now dominating the center of the view. Mist rises from the impact zone, and the canyon walls loom close on both sides. The river water appears turbulent near the falls, and the environment feels more enclosed and dramatic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverbank that transforms from a secluded forest trail into a dramatic encounter with a massive waterfall. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt path through dense green vegetation and thick bushes, passing a large tree while the waterfall remains a distant silhouette between canyon walls. As the character moves past the foliage, the path opens into a wider section of the canyon where large rocks line the trail and the waterfall grows increasingly dominant in the frame. The scene then shifts toward the base of the falls, where the environment becomes more enclosed by looming cliff faces and the air fills with rising mist. Finally, the camera reaches the turbulent waters of the impact zone, with the towering waterfall now completely filling the center of the view.
